name: 法玛斯 | 2A2F
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been custom painted with a tread plate pattern and \"2A2F\" on the handguard. \"2A2F—reliable shipping in an unreliable world\"
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 它被定制涂装上了防滑板图案，并且在护手上有 “2A2F” 字样。 “2A2F—— 在不可靠的世界里提供可靠运输”
